SpTU 4, 222B [sale of prebend][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[... A-šu₂] ⸢ša₂ md⸣[UTU—MU ...]

(o 1') [... son] of Šamaš-iddin [...].

o 2'2'

[... KU₃.BABBAR] ša₂ gi-ni ⸢a⸣-[na ŠAM₂]

(o 2') [... of silver] with the ginnu-mark for [the price]

o 3'3'

[... a-na m]i-su A-šu₂ ša₂ m[DU—A]

(o 3') He gave [... to] Isu, son of [Mukin-apli, descendant of Gimil]-Nanaya.

o 4'4'

[A mŠU—d]na-na-[a] ⸢id⸣-din PAP 2 MA.NA ⸢7⸣ [GIN₂ ...]

(o 4') The total (is) 2 minas 7 [shekels ...] silver which have accordingly been given as the additional (payment).

o 5'5'

[...] KU₃.BABBAR ša₂ ⸢a⸣-ki-i pi-i a-⸢tar⸣ SUM.[NA]

o 6'6'

[... md]UTU—NUMUN-GIŠ ⸢ŠAM₂⸣ GIŠ.ŠUB-šu₂ ki-i ⸢kas₃⸣-[pi]

(o 6') [...] Šamaš-zer-lišir has received the price of his prebend for payment [...] from the hand of Isu, son of Mukin-apli, descendant of Gimil-[Nanaya]. He is paid.

o 7'7'

[...] ⸢i⸣-[na] ⸢ŠU⸣ [m]i-su A-šu₂ ša₂ mDU—A A mŠU—⸢d⸣[na-na-a]

o 8'8'

[ma]-⸢ḫir a⸣-[pil] za!-ki ru-gum-ma-a ul i-[ši]

(o 8') He is free (from claim). There will be no claim. They will no return and they will not raise a claim against each other.

o 9'9'

ul i-tur-[ru]-⸢ma⸣ a-na <a>-ḫa-miš ul i-rag-gu-[mu]

o 10'10'

⸢ma⸣-ti-ma [ina] ⸢EGIR u₄⸣-mu ina ⸢ŠEŠ⸣-MEŠ DUMU-MEŠ

(o 10') At any time in the future, (anyone) from the brothers, sons, family, relatives (or) clients of the house of Šamaš-zer-[lišir] who will raise a claim concerning [...].

o 11'11'

IM.RI.A [IM].RI.A sa-[la]-tu₄ ša₂ E₂

o 12'12'

[md]UTU—⸢NUMUN⸣—[GIŠ] ša₂ ⸢E₁₁⸣-[ma a]-na muḫ-⸢ḫi⸣

o 13'13'

[... i]-⸢dab-bu⸣-[ub]

(rest of obverse missing)
Reverse
rr NaN  (start of reverse missing)
r 1'r 1'

[IGI mdNA₃]—A—MU ⸢A⸣-šu₂ ⸢ša₂⸣ [...]

(r 1') [Before Nabu]-apla-iddin, son of [...; Ša-pi]-Anu, son of [Šamaš]-eṭir, descendant of Rab-[banu]; Anu-balassu-iqbi, son of Šamaš-zer-ukin, descendant of Pir˒išu; Anu-ikṣur, son of Kudurranu, [descendant of] Nur-Sin; Šamaš-eṭir, son of [Anu]-dan, [descendant] of Kuri; Anu-zer-iddin, son of Hahhuru; Nanaya-iddin, son of Nidintu-Anu, descendant of Rab-bani; Libluṭ, son of Šamaš-zer-ibni, descendant of Balassu; Anu-zer-iddin, [son of] Šamaš-per˒u-uṣur, descendant of [...]; Šamaš-kaṣir, [son of] Ištar-zer-...; Nabu-nadin, [...].

r 2'2'

[mša₂-pi-i]—d60 A-šu₂ ša₂ m⸢d⸣[UTU]—⸢SUR A lu₂GAL⸣—[DU₃]
